Section Title: ... > FTSMEAU profile
Content:
The First Trust Strategic Metal and Energy Equity UCITS Fund A (USD) (Acc) is a(n) Equity Mutual Funds (MF) seeks to invest in Extraction of natural resources sector located in Global. The First Trust fund’s base currency is USD and the share class was registered 08.02.2021 with unique ISIN - IE00BK7ZX207. Main exchange is OTC Mutual Funds and ticker symbol is FTSMEAU. The total expense ratio is 0.75%. The First Trust Strategic Metal and Energy Equity UCITS Fund A (USD) (Acc) pays dividends 0 time(s) per year.

results.title: Home Page | First Trust Global Portfolios
excerpts:
Section Title: Thematic Quarterly Update
Content:
Friday 17 April
10.00 AM BST / 11.00 AM CET
First Trust Global Portfolios Management Limited ("FTGPM") is the Management Company of First Trust Global Funds plc and distributes and markets a range of ETFs and funds under the First Trust Global Funds plc umbrella. First Trust Global Portfolios Limited ("FTGP") was established in December 2011 and distributes funds in certain European jurisdictions as well as acting as sub-adviser to certain funds. FTGPM and FTGP are affiliates of First Trust Advisors L.P. and First Trust Portfolios L.P. ("First Trust"). First Trust's mission is to provide trusted, transparent and superior investment solutions and services that will contribute to the prosperity of its clients.
